entries.notes: स्वादि चिञ् — engine तृच् demos; not in 940 Bhvādi v2 slice.
स्तोता — ``stuY`` SLP1; full ``zwuY`` ठु-it pending extended १.३.५/९ in engine.
डुकृञ् — ``kF`` engine slice until ``DukfY`` / ``qukfY`` डु-it is complete in it-prakaraṇa.
णीञ् — णो नः (6.1.65) on Nvul path.
